ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model (e.g., AMM-EpiInvert) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "model_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "model_last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_author" TEXT /* Author of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_variables" (
  "target_variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target variable */,
  "target_variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the target variable (e.g., inc case) */,
  "target_variable_description" TEXT /* Description of the target variable */,
  "target_variable_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the target variable (e.g., people, percentage) */,
  "target_variable_data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the target variable (e.g., integer, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., BG, CH, DE) */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Code of the location (e.g., ISO code) */,
  "location_level" TEXT /* Level of the location (e.g., country, region, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantiles" (
  "quantile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantile */,
  "quantile_name" TEXT /* Name of the quantile (e.g., all_quantiles_all_horizons) */,
  "quantile_description" TEXT /* Description of the quantile */,
  "quantile_value" REAL /* Value of the quantile (e.g., 0.5 for 50th percentile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horizons" (
  "horizon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horizon */,
  "horizon_name" TEXT /* Name of the horizon */,
  "horizon_description" TEXT /* Description of the horizon */,
  "horizon_value" INTEGER /* Value of the horizon (e.g., 1 for short-term, 2 for medium-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horizon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusions" (
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exclusion */,
  "exclusion_name" TEXT /* Name of the exclusion (e.g., not_excluded_manually) */,
  "exclusion_description" TEXT /* Description of the exclusion */,
  "exclusion_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exclusion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exclusion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wis" (
  "wis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wisdom */,
  "wis_name" TEXT /* Name of the wisdom (e.g., rel_wis) */,
  "wis_description" TEXT /* Description of the wisdom */,
  "wis_value" REAL /* Value of the wisdom (e.g., 0.8 for relative wisdom) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "model_run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the run */,
  "target_variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target variable used in the run */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the run was performed */,
  "quantile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quantile used in the run */,
  "horizon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horizon used in the run */,
  "exclusion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exclusion used in the run */,
  "wis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wisdom used in the run */,
  "ensemble_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ensemble used in the run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was performed */,
  "run_time" TEXT /* Time when the run was performed */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_exclusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("exclusion_id") REFERENCES exclusions ("exclusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_wis_id FOREIGN KEY ("wis_id") REFERENCES wis ("wis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_target_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_variable_id") REFERENCES target_variables ("target_variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_quantile_id FOREIGN KEY ("quantile_id") REFERENCES quantiles ("quantile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_horizon_id FOREIGN KEY ("horizon_id") REFERENCES horizons ("horizon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_run_outputs" (
  "model_run_output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run output */,
  "model_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run that produced the output */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Value of the output */,
  "output_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the output (e.g., people, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_run_output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_run_outputs_model_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("model_run_id")
)
